note: Canonical T0 starter weapons — each row includes weaponSkills (slot1, slot2, slot3Options) and full skills.slots 1–3 bindings.

weapons.name: Training Sword
weapons.description: A blunted training blade for recruits.

weapons.name: Hunting Spear

weapons.name: Training Greatsword

weapons.name: Training Warhammer

weapons.name: Light Crossbow
weapons.description: A crude repeater cobbled from scrap.

weapons.name: Flintlock Pistol
weapons.description: A homemade flintlock more loud than accurate.

weapons.name: Apprentice Wand
weapons.description: A novice’s wand that flickers with raw magic. Branches into fire, frost, holy, arcane, and lightning staves at T1.

weapons.name: Sapling Staff
weapons.description: A living branch that roots the wielder to the earth.

weapons.name: Crude Tool
weapons.description: A multipurpose gathering tool for chipping, cutting, and prying.
